examples: He thought the speech a model of its kind, limpid and unaffected.
There was, however, a lotus pond of limpid blue in front of my door.
Ibrahim Muhawi's limpid translation captures the longing, the ache of exile.
In her limpid, elastic prose the business of creating photographs is turned into poetry.
Yera guides his battered fiberglass boat into the deep, limpid water, using an old 25hp Yamaha motor.
